'''3B3-1204''', also known as '''7169''', was a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] in the service of [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray's]] [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], 3B3-1204 was a part of the force that [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invaded]] and later occupied the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], at Gunray's behest. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] and his unit were stationed in the [[Theed Hangar/Legends|Theed Hangar]] to guard the [[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship/Legends|personal starship]] of the planet's [[Queen/Legends|queen]], [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]]. 3B3-1204 and the rest of his unit were soon after destroyed by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]].

==Biography==
[[File:3B31204die.png|thumb|left|180px|3B3-1204 and his unit leader are destroyed by Qui-Gon Jinn.]]
3B3-1204 was a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] serving in the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]]. He was a part of the force brought by [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]<ref name="tpm" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]<ref name="NEC" /> as a protest against the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate's]] new taxation of [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]]. When Gunray had the planet [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invaded]], he installed an occupation force, of which 3B3-1204 was a part. 3B3-1204's unit occupied the [[Theed Hangar/Legends|Theed Hangar]], where they guarded Naboo [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala's]] [[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship/Legends|J-type 327 Nubian royal starship]]. Several of the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] had been captured, and were being held in the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] as well.<ref name="tpm" />

Shortly after the occupation took place, a group, including Amidala, led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], entered the hangar. Jinn spoke directly with 3B3-1204's [[OOM command battle droid/Legends|OOM command battle droid]] [[2163/Legends|2163]], stating that he was taking the party to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="tpm" /> Meanwhile, 3B3-1204 had anti-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] tactics programmed into him remotely by the Federation's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']]. He then began uploading the program to the rest of the unit,<ref name="ccg" /> but Jinn had already drawn his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], which he used to attack the [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. 3B3-1204 was [[Sai cha/Legends|beheaded]] by Jinn's first stroke,<ref name="tpm" /> before he could finish his upload. Jinn and his party, among them Amidala, were then able to seize the royal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and depart the planet.<ref name="tpm" />

==Features and functions==
3B3-1204 had [[Color/Legends|white]] plating, black [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]],<ref name="tpm" /> [[Gender/Legends|masculine programming]],<ref name="ccg" /> and, like all B1 battle droids, stood 1.91 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="db" /> 3B3-1204 had the ability to receive programming from the Trade Federation flagship remotely while in the middle of a situation. He also had the ability to remotely upload his programming to his fellow [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] himself.<ref name="ccg" /> 3B3-1204 was also equipped with an [[E-5 blaster rifle/Legends|E-5 blaster rifle]].<ref name="tpm" />

==Behind the scenes==
3B3-1204 first appeared in [[George Lucas]]' [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] as an unnamed battle droid. The character was later identified in the ''[[Theed Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].
